data.body: G-2 (oscillation signal) folded into this epic per design review. G-2 is the READ-SIDE symptom detector; G-1 is the cause. rebar already persists reword-tolerant norm_ids across ~10 runs in the REVIEW_RESULT sidecar, so oscillation detection is a pure deterministic read (annotate a finding oscillating:true when a norm_id present in run N-2, absent in N-1, reappears in N; optionally REPLAN_ESCALATE after K non-empty runs on the same material lineage). No LLM call, no blocking change. The design coupling that motivates folding: the *coaching prose* for an oscillating finding ('resolve the tension between X and Y before re-running') depends on G-1's conflict identification to name X and Y. Brainstorm both together: conflict detection (cause) + oscillation signal (symptom) as one convergence-hardening design.
